subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold! The banquet of joy is in full array, and the feast of tribulation hath been arranged with utmost order and perfection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان بزم خوشی برپاست و جشن بلا در نهایت ترتیب و تنظیم آراسته گشته و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
